_description: Hex data for known/referenced hexes extracted from scenario data. Full terrain digitization requires SM_Map.jpg — use map-digitizer script to complete.
_digitizationNote: The full map is approximately 56 columns × 35 rows (pointy-top hex grid). All hexes listed here are confirmed from SM_Rules.pdf scenario text. Terrain type for non-confirmed hexes is 'unknown' and must be verified against SM_Map.jpg.

elevationSystem._note: elevation is the contour level at hex center (zero-based); wedgeElevations[i] is the offset at hexside i (highest point); feet = (elevation + wedgeElevations[i]) * contourInterval + baseElevation. SM Special Slope rule (1.1): 50-foot contour interval. Vertical slopes are impassable to all units.

_todoHexes._note: The following setup positions use zone constraints (within N hexes of reference). All hexes in these zones must be populated from SM_Map.jpg.

steps: 2. Identify the printed hex coordinate grid (col.row labels on map edges)
3. For each hex: record terrain type, elevation band, hexside features (slopes, streams, roads)
4. Use the hex coordinate labels from confirmed scenario hexes as calibration anchors
5. Run validate-data.js after each batch to catch referential integrity errors
6. Update _status to 'available' when all hexes are populated
_digitizationPlan.priorityHexes: VP hexes and setup hexes listed in this file — these must be correct before any rules engine work begins
